# workbench Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "workbench" {
  host = "https://workbench.verily.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host` (String) example of a wsm server is https://workbench.verily.com
